title: More Improvable Skills [Addon]
description: Addon for Improvable Skills that adds more skills
body:
### This mod is an addon for the [Improvable Skills](https://modrinth.com/mod/improvable-skills) # The mod adds several new skills and abilities: ![Fly Speed ico](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e81d682b1e6fa3b58dbd5b867865c246e2eecf7.png) **Fly speed:** This skill increases your flight speed. (Works only with flight similar to Creative Mode.)
![Run Speed ico](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49f0185dfad267f6365581af50e20b7f64ae88f1.png) **Run Speed:** This skill increases your run speed.
![Aqua Digger Ico](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3b3af14722bbfc6155fb87928fbf49d4cd6409f.png) **Mining Anywhere:** Reduces the mining penalty when underwater, in air, on lader. At max level, completely removes the penalty.
![Auto Step ico](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/57c3e26dd5f0345c20a260d2d9cb56014d60c61b.png) **Auto Step:** Automatically steps up one block height without jumping.
![Magnetism Filter ico](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff7c8e92c0557b054b8a972f7bab4a6eb4e4a03f_0.webp) **Magnetism Filter:** This skill allows you to filter which items will be attracted to you by the Magnetism skill. ##
Русское описание ![Fly Speed ico](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e81d682b1e6fa3b58dbd5b867865c246e2eecf7.png) **Скорость полета:** Навык позволяет вам увеличить скорость полета. (Работает только на креативный полет, так же совместимо с модовой броней/вещами позволяющие летать.)
![Run Speed ico](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49f0185dfad267f6365581af50e20b7f64ae88f1.png) **Скорость бега:** Навык позволяет увеличить скорость бега.
![Aqua Digger Ico](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3b3af14722bbfc6155fb87928fbf49d4cd6409f.png) **Копай где угодно:** Навык позволяет уменьшить штраф за копание под водой, в воздухе, на лестнице.
![Auto Step ico](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/57c3e26dd5f0345c20a260d2d9cb56014d60c61b.png) **Авто подъем:** Автоматически перемещает вас на блок выше без прыжка.
![Magnetism Filter ico](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff7c8e92c0557b054b8a972f7bab4a6eb4e4a03f_0.webp) **Фильтр магнита:** Навык позволяющий отфильтровать предметы которые будет притягивать магнит.
## ### Permissions and Note: - **You are not allowed to include this mod in your own mod.** - **You can use this mod in your modpack.** - **You are not allowed to re-publish this mod to other sites without providing a Modrinth/CurseForge download link** - **If you have any ideas for improving the mod, or if you notice a bug, feel free to send me a PM on Discord (xilan1)**
